answer: The default WiredTiger internal cache size is the larger of either 50% of (RAM - 1GB), or 0.256 GB.
Snappy block compression for all collections and prefix compression for all indexes.
With the filesystem cache, MongoDB automatically uses all free memory that is not used by the WiredTiger cache or by other processes.
You can de-fragment your data file by resyncing a replica set member or using the compact command.
